notes: Feedback-progress archetype: linear track + fill with optional buffer, label, helper rows and segmented/striped/indeterminate modes. Determinate by default; switches to indeterminate via aria-valuenow omission.
Three variants: filled (default, neutral track + colored fill), outlined (transparent track + border), soft (role-tinted container track + same fill). All share one fill colour per role.

Roles brand|danger|warning|info|success|neutral expose three slots each (--progress-{role}-fill / -soft-track / -label). data-role swaps the internal --_pg-* chain to the matching slot rather than remapping --brand-*; this keeps soft-variant tracks colour-paired to fills without an extra container layer.
Track is intentionally NEUTRAL in the filled variant (--surface-base-cm-bg) so the value bar carries all the role colour; soft variant tints the track with the role's container.

Buffer slot (--progress-buffer-bg + opacity) overlays the unfilled track for streaming/video patterns. Stripe overlay (--progress-stripe-opacity) animates over the fill via --progress-stripe-duration.
Has NO interactive states (hover/focus/pressed) by design — progressbar is a status output, not an input. Focus tokens exist only for cases where the bar is wrapped in a focusable container.
